transcript: Speaker A: English aap tabhi theek se bol paayenge jab aapki vocabulary achchi hogi. Aur aap bas ek game khelkar naye words seekh sakte hain. SpeakX app par jaiye aur play option par click kariye. Wahan aapko milega crossword game. Jo bhi akshar milein, usse naye words banate jaiye. Jaise-jaise aap level complete karte jayenge, aapki English behtar hoti jayegi. Crossword game khelkar naye words seekhiye. Aur uske liye abhi SpeakX app download kar lijiye. [You will only be able to speak English properly when your vocabulary is good. And you can learn new words just by playing a game. Go to the SpeakX app and click on the play option. There you will find a crossword game. Keep making new words from whatever letters you get. As you complete levels, your English will keep getting better. Learn new words by playing the crossword game. And for that, download the SpeakX app now.]
on_screen_text: English aap tabhi theek se bol paayenge jab aapki vocabulary achchi hogi aur aap bas ek game khelkar naye words seekh sakte hain speakX app par jaiye aur play option par click kariye wahan aapko milega cross word game jo bhi akshar milein usse naye words banate jaiye jaise-jaise aap level complete karte jayenge aapki English behtar hoti jayegi cross word game khelkar naye words seekhiye aur uske liye abhi speakX app download kar lijiye [You will only be able to speak English properly when your vocabulary is good and you can learn new words just by playing a game. Go to the SpeakX app and click on the play option. There you will find a crossword game. Keep making new words from whatever letters you get. As you complete levels, your English will keep getting better. Learn new words by playing the crossword game. And for that, download the SpeakX app now.]
summary: An AI presenter demonstrates the crossword game feature on the SpeakX app to help users build their English vocabulary. The ad highlights how playing levels improves language skills and ends with a call to download the app.
